targets.rawSql: SELECT route, ROUND(AVG(avg_wait_sec)::numeric, 1) AS avg_wait_sec, ROUND(AVG(p95_wait_sec)::numeric, 1) AS p95_wait_sec FROM eta_analytics GROUP BY route ORDER BY avg_wait_sec DESC LIMIT 22

panels.title: Average Wait by Hour of Day

targets.rawSql: SELECT hour_of_day, ROUND(AVG(avg_wait_sec)::numeric, 1) AS avg_wait_sec FROM eta_analytics GROUP BY hour_of_day ORDER BY hour_of_day
SELECT computed_at AS time, route AS metric, p95_wait_sec AS value FROM eta_analytics WHERE computed_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY computed_at
